chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1810 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.7815/2023 3. For hearing of main case 06-03-2024 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that in the trial evidence of some of the witnesses has been recorded, hence he does not press this petition. Accordingly this petitioner is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
